title: Lead SEO Specialist at Ecom Express Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Ecom Express Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled SEO Specialist looking for your next big career move? Ecom Express Holdings Services in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ecom Express Holdings Services:
Ecom Express Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Holdings Services!
